footer.description: A civil society organisation developing sustainable youth policies for a sustainable world.

home.title: GEGET — Youth, Future and Society Association
home.description: A civil society organisation developing sustainable youth policies for a sustainable world.

about.title: About Us — GEGET
about.description: The story, vision, mission, and values of GEGET.

projects.title: Our Projects — GEGET
projects.description: Our youth policy, education, and social impact projects.

hero.title: Sustainable youth policies for a sustainable world
hero.subtitle: Youth, Future and Society Association
hero.lede: With evidence-based policy, youth-friendly cities, and strong youth networks — we bring young voices to the decision table.

mission.quote: We must build a world not for young people, but with them
mission.description: At GEGET, we champion the active participation of young people in societal decision-making and lead the development of sustainable youth policies.

focusAreas.title: A youth ecosystem
focusAreas.subtitle: We work across six core areas to unlock the potential of young people.

youthPolicies.title: Youth Policies
youthPolicies.description: Developing and advocating for evidence-based, inclusive youth policies.

youthFriendlyCities.title: Youth-Friendly Cities
youthFriendlyCities.description: Urban models that improve young people's access to and participation in city life.

youthWellbeing.title: Youth Wellbeing
youthWellbeing.description: Programmes that support the physical, mental, and social wellbeing of young people.

youthNetworks.title: Youth Networks
youthNetworks.description: Building and strengthening national and international youth networks.

youthProjects.title: Youth Projects
youthProjects.description: Projects that develop young people's leadership and entrepreneurial skills.

empowerment.title: Empowered Futures
empowerment.description: Initiatives that empower young people within decision-making structures.

youthCities.title: Youth-Friendly Cities
youthCities.description: We develop accessible and inclusive urban models that enable young people to actively participate in city life.

cta.title: Youth Will Be Here
cta.description: Join us in shaping the future of young people, together.

story.title: Being the Voice of Youth
story.p1: GEGET — Youth, Future and Society Association is a civil society organisation founded to empower young people to play an active role in public life.
story.p2: Our core areas of work include developing sustainable youth policies, building youth-friendly cities, and strengthening youth networks.
story.p3: Our greatest motivation is building a future not for young people, but together with them.

vision.title: OUR VISION
vision.description: A sustainable and inclusive world where young people participate fully and equally in societal decision-making.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.description: To develop evidence-based youth policies, strengthen youth networks, and amplify the voices of young people.

think.title: Think
think.description: Analyse the needs of young people and examine the data.

design.title: Design
design.description: Develop solutions and policies through participatory methods.

implement.title: Implement
implement.description: Create tangible change through projects and measure the impact.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Working alongside stakeholders to create shared solutions.

participation.title: Participation
participation.description: Ensuring the active involvement of young people at every stage.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Being open and accountable in all processes.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity
inclusivity.description: Embracing every young person, together with their differences.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Making a difference through creative and forward-thinking approaches.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Carrying out work that creates long-term impact.

gencDostu.title: Youth-Friendly Cities Programme
gencDostu.description: A comprehensive programme aimed at increasing youth participation in urban life across various cities in Turkiye.

politikaForumu.title: Youth Policy Forum
politikaForumu.description: An annual forum where youth policies are discussed and policy recommendations are developed at national and international level.

dijitalOkuryazarlik.title: Digital Literacy Workshop
dijitalOkuryazarlik.description: Hands-on workshops designed to enhance the digital competencies of young people.

akranMentorluk.title: Peer Mentoring Programme
akranMentorluk.description: A programme where experienced young people mentor their peers, supporting personal and professional development.

arastirmaRaporu.title: Youth Research Report 2026
arastirmaRaporu.description: A comprehensive research report analysing the situation of young people in Turkiye.

kodlaGelecegini.title: Code Your Future
kodlaGelecegini.description: A training programme equipping young people with foundational skills in software and technology.

empty.title: Coming Soon
empty.description: We will be sharing our projects here soon.
